_publications._publicationTitle: Cyclic AMP suppression is sufficient to induce gliomagenesis in a mouse model of neurofibromatosis-1.

_contextSnippet: Twelve of 13 OPG mice injected with catalytically-active PDE4A1 lentivirus demonstrated increased BLI and expression of mCherry fluorescent protein/PDE4A at the injection site (Figure 2A-C)... While PDE4A (not shown) and mCherry positive cells (Figure 4A) were observed at injection sites in mice without tumors
details: Successfully detected mCherry fluorescent protein expression at injection sites in both tumor-bearing and non-tumor mice
